	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`adminId` int NOT NULL,
	`action` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`entityType` varchar(100),
	`entityId` int,
	`details` longtext,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `admin_logs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `advertiser_profiles` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`companyName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`industry` varchar(100),
	`description` longtext,
	`website` varchar(255),
	`logoUrl` varchar(512),
	`verificationStatus` enum('pending','verified','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`stripeAccountId` varchar(255),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `advertiser_profiles_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
--> statement-breakpoint

	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`jobType` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`targetId` int,
	`targetType` varchar(100),
	`status` enum('pending','processing','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',

	`maxRetries` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,

	`startedAt` timestamp,
	`completedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `background_jobs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `campaign_analytics` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`campaignId` int NOT NULL,
	`totalCreators` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`acceptedCreators` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`completedCreators` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

	`averageEngagementRate` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
	`totalReach` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),

	CONSTRAINT `campaign_analytics_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
